_comment: Example of the BRANDED operator catalog the marketplace generator emits for Sterling. The customer adds this marketplace, installs 'sterling-workspace', and the baked-in TOOLBELT_INVITE routes them into Sterling's governed org (State C). To Sterling's brand it says Sterling; Apexti is the quiet 'powered by' mark.
name: sterling-ai

plugins.name: sterling-workspace
plugins.description: Your Sterling-managed AI workspace inside Claude.
